title: Cheaply made, not leather, no support, emails ignored
body: These shoes look good in the pictures and videos, but they are very cheaply made. They were advertised as supportive leather walking shoes. They have no support, and they are not leather. I submitted a return request per the website policy and was told I would receive an answer in 24-48 hours. I never heard from them. I have sent 3 additional emails with no response.

title: Didn't fit, cannot contact company to return
body: Unfortunately the shoes didn't fit (even though I ordered my normal size) and now I cannot contact this company to start a return. I followed their instructions online to start the return process and their email server keeps kicking my emails back to me. Their phone number is a Google phone number and no one ever answers it or responds to my voicemails. They have no other way to get ahold of them. Very frustrating.

title: Cheaply made, plastic, no support, not orthopedic
body: The shoes I ordered are cheaply made, plastic, offer no support, and are not orthopedic by any means. They are not worth the money I paid. I emailed their support twice with no response. I do not recommend this company.

title: Return nightmare: offered discount, ship to China, maybe get refund
body: I am trying to return shoes that do not fit. I started this process a month ago. I have been given the run around by being offered 30% discount to keep the shoes, then told I had to mail the shoes to China, which costs almost as much as the shoes. Then they told me they could not provide a prepaid shipping label because it was against their policy. I was given a return address in CA and told to mail them there. However, they can't guarantee a refund unless I have a tracking number. So they want me to pay for shoes that don't fit, pay to mail them back, and then maybe I will get a refund.

title: Cheap, not comfortable, zero arch support, misleading advertising
body: Very cheap product, not at all comfortable and zero arch support. The advertising is very misleading. Requested a return authorization but have had zero response in a week.
personas: The Plantar Fasciitis & Heel Pain Sufferer

title: Tracking shows delivered, never received, company stopped responding
body: I placed an order for shoes. The tracking information showed they were delivered but I did not receive them. I contacted the merchant several times and their response was that I need to contact the carrier to find them. They were not helpful in any way and would not offer me a refund or a replacement. They finally just stopped responding to me. I would not recommend doing business with them.

title: Sole separating after 2 months, only offered 20% discount
body: I bought a pair of these shoes, and within 2 months, the sole on the right shoe began to separate from the upper. When I contacted 'customer service,' they offered me a 10% discount to buy a new pair. I told them that was unacceptable, and then they offered me a 20% discount. That's not a resolution to the problem of their shoe falling apart after a couple months of LIGHT use. Don't waste your money on this junk.

title: Just ok, runs small, needs insert
body: The shoe is ok. Runs a half size small in my opinion. Not very much arch support. It is a very light weight shoe which is nice. Will have to buy some type of insert for it to be comfortable. So for the money it is just ok.
personas: The Plantar Fasciitis & Heel Pain Sufferer
